channel.title: Infinite Powers — Audiobook
channel.description: Full audiobook of "Infinite Powers: How Calculus Reveals the Secrets of the Universe" by Steven Strogatz, narrated by AI voice (George). New chapters released regularly.
channel.itunes:author: Steven Strogatz
channel.copyright: Original content © Steven Strogatz. This recording is a personal AI-narrated project.

item.title: Chapter 1 — Infinity
item.itunes:title: Chapter 1 — Infinity
item.description: The first chapter of Steven Strogatz's "Infinite Powers." From counting and shapes in antiquity, to Archimedes' pizza-proof for the area of a circle, to Zeno's paradox and the concept of limits — a tour through the origins of calculus, narrated in full.
item.itunes:summary: The first chapter of Steven Strogatz's "Infinite Powers." From counting and shapes in antiquity, to Archimedes' pizza-proof for the area of a circle, to Zeno's paradox and the concept of limits — a tour through the origins of calculus, narrated in full.
